candidate_event_schema.candidate_set_boundary: only frozen-source iterator candidates are replayed; no alternate traversal is claimed
candidate_event_schema.returned_candidate: the final source mapping and score retained separately for source replay validation
candidate_event_schema.yielded_candidate: every complete mapping yielded by the frozen VF2 iterator, retaining index, mapping, source-score bits, leaves, and order

claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: broad cross-input generality, a numerical remedy, a production mapping change, an alternate search path, a confirmed Qiskit bug, cross-platform determinism, hardware relevance, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: a preregistered candidate replay and independent arithmetic oracle on a graph nonisomorphic to R170

independent_oracle.checks: row hashes, retained leaf scores, exact rational sums, four policies, source-return mapping, aggregate split
independent_oracle.inputs: committed R172 worker manifests and aggregate result only

input_description: five-active-qubit weighted T-tree with degree sequence (3,2,1,1,1), nonisomorphic to the R170 path, selected by a bounded 625-variant scan

selection_rule.replace: replace incumbent only when the policy comparison is Less

title: B4/B8 R172 nonisomorphic second near-tie replay protocol
